title: LOW INCOME WATER/SEWER PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF GLADSTONE LOW INCOME WATER/SEWER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a reduction on base rate of monthly charge for water, sewer,and storm water services. 18505 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: -Must meet income guidelines that are based on 50% of Median Family Income (see website for current chart) -Utility bills must be in the applicant's name and the applicant must reside at the property -Applicant cannot be delinquent in any payment owed to the City of Gladstone Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 557-2771 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Utility Billing (503) 557-2771 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for an application and more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application, last 2 years of tax returns, and last 2 months of bank statements for all adult household members AREA SERVED: City of Gladstone Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF GLADSTONE CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF GLADSTONE POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF GLADSTONE
